title: filter items before automating an event in google calendar
excerpt: I’d like to see an automation for events created in google calendar for items where I am the owner in my groups (each board has a Public Relations group) and for items where i have a date. some items don’t have dates yet…

posts.author: SandoCourtney (Courtney Pulitzer)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d like to see an automation for events created in google calendar for items where I am the owner in my groups (each board has a Public Relations group) and for items where i have a date. some items don’t have dates yet.
Thanks!
